case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS WALKER ARTHUR DBA 2630 POST ST.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $626.56 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER ARTHUR DBA 2630 POST ST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER ARTHUR DBA 2630 POST ST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALKER ARTHUR DBA 2630 POST ST. $626.56 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $641.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER ARTHUR DBA 2630 POST ST.
